creator: phil@mediawen.com
text:
Got the same issue with :

# make MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes

  c++ -o /alt/ports/www/node/work/node-v11.10.0/out/Release/obj.target/node_lib/src/node_os.o ../src/node_os.cc '-DNODE_OPENSSL_CERT_STORE' '-DNODE_ARCH="x64"' '-DNODE_PLATFORM="freebsd"' '-DNODE_WANT_INTERNALS=1' '-DV8_DEPRECATION_WARNINGS=1' '-DNODE_OPENSSL_SYSTEM_CERT_PATH=""' '-DHAVE_INSPECTOR=1' '-DHAVE_DTRACE=1' '-DNODE_REPORT' '-D__POSIX__' '-DNODE_USE_V8_PLATFORM=1' '-DNODE_HAVE_I18N_SUPPORT=1' '-DHAVE_OPENSSL=1' '-DHTTP_PARSER_STRICT=0' -I../src -I/alt/ports/www/node/work/node-v11.10.0/out/Release/obj/gen -I/alt/ports/www/node/work/node-v11.10.0/out/Release/obj/gen/include -I/alt/ports/www/node/work/node-v11.10.0/out/Release/obj/gen/src -I../deps/histogram/src -I../deps/v8/include -I../deps/http_parser -I../deps/llhttp/include -I../deps/brotli/c/include  -pthread -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -m64 -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -O3 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fno-rtti -fno-exceptions -std=gnu++1y -MMD -MF /alt/ports/www/node/work/node-v11.10.0/out/Release/.deps//alt/ports/www/node/work/node-v11.10.0/out/Release/obj.target/node_lib/src/node_os.o.d.raw -isystem /usr/local/include -O2 -pipe -fembed-bitcode -fstack-protector -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing  -isystem /usr/local/include  -c
../src/node_os.cc:63:12: error: use of undeclared identifier 'UV_MAXHOSTNAMESIZE'
  char buf[UV_MAXHOSTNAMESIZE];
           ^
../src/node_os.cc:100:3: error: unknown type name 'uv_utsname_t'
  uv_utsname_t info;
  ^
2 errors generated.
gmake[3]: *** [node_lib.target.mk:314: /alt/ports/www/node/work/node-v11.10.0/out/Release/obj.target/node_lib/src/node_os.o] Error 1
rm dd3a5ac3f52cdaf53c3606fefabfbeadc76a553d.intermediate 928dd17ba29536933dfcabbac2044472b7d7c18f.intermediate bcdf201f23e8d413ccf9cd373815f602814e7e69.intermediate
gmake[2]: *** [Makefile:100: node] Error 2
gmake[2]: Leaving directory '/alt/ports/www/node/work/node-v11.10.0'
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /alt/ports/www/node
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /alt/ports/www/node
